title: allionia linearis var. coccinea
intro: Allionia linearis var. coccinea is a plant species, also known as red allion, that belongs to the Nyctaginaceae family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Allionia linearis var. coccinea include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for various applications in natural remedies.
